GG0170F4_TOILT_TRNSFR_FLWP_CD GG0170F4 Mobility: Toilet Transfer Ability at Follow-Up Indicates the patient's ability to safely transfer on or off the toilet at follow-up. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only
